data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions (Normal) will be tripled.
Don't miss out on this chance!

🗓️Mission Normal*3 2/13(Mon) 19:00 – 2/20 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
